subcodes.first_line: The nobility and exaltation of the human world today are due to divine bounty, and eternal glory shineth across all horizons through the radiance of enlightenment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اشرفا شرف عالم انسانی امروز بموهبت ربانیست و عزت ابدیه در آفاق بپرتو اشراق
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @high station of the true believer
